description:
A modular legal and financial toolkit for managing operational, technical, and liability risks faced by builder teams and individual contributors. ART solutions address scenarios such as protocol failures, data breaches, litigation, product liability, and professional liability through bespoke legal and financial instruments.
Risk management instruments are typically based on a self-insurance layer and may include internal risk pools, captive insurance vehicles, performance bonds and guarantees, Directors & Officers (D&O) insurance frameworks, and financial reinsurance.  These instruments can be integrated into a comprehensive legal risk management framework for a project. 

**Typical use cases:**

- High‑risk technical systems
- Contributor liability protection
- DAO‑adjacent risk exposure

Suitable for teams seeking structured, proactive risk mitigation beyond standard insurance.
recurringServices: Operation and maintenance of financial vehicles
Oversight of structures through technical committees
setupServices: Risk identification, classification, assessment, and mapping
Evaluation of suitable risk management instruments
Design, structuring, and implementation of legal vehicles
Set up insurance and reinsurance mechanisms
summary: Programmable, modular risk infrastructure for contributor and builder teams where traditional insurance falls short.
title: Alternative Risk Transfer
